---
title: "data_import"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

How to load file with **readr**

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

Focus on **plain-text rectangular files: CSV**

```{r}
students <- read_csv("students_file.csv")
students
```

converting to R readable NA

```{r}
students <- read_csv("students_file.csv", na = c("N/A", ""))
students
```

rename variable to avoid spaces

```{r}
students |> 
  rename(
    student_id = `Student ID`, 
    full_name = `Full Name`
  )
```

```{r}
students |> 
  janitor::clean_names() |> 
  mutate(
    meal_plan = factor(meal_plan)
  )
```

```{r}
students |> 
  janitor::clean_names() |> 
  mutate(
    meal_plan = factor(meal_plan),
    age = parse_number(if_else(age == "five", "5", age))
  )
```
